creator: rich@enterprisesystems.net
text:
StarTech 1 port PCI Express Parallel Adapter Card not reconized.

Chipset is OXPCIe952

pciconf -lv 

none4@pci0:2:0:0:       class=0x070102 card=0xc1101415 chip=0xc1101415 rev=0x00
hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Oxford Semiconductor Ltd - now part of PLX Technology'
    class      = simple comms
    subclass   = parallel port

Mar 27 11:50:35 kernel: pcib2: <MPTable PCI-PCI bridge> irq 18 at devi
ce 28.2 on pci0
Mar 27 11:50:35 kernel: pci2: <PCI bus> on pcib2
Mar 27 11:50:35 kernel: pci2: <simple comms, parallel port> at device
0.0 (no driver attached)

applied patch 134878 to pucdata.c

no help
